scripts.build:js: npx terser public/shared.js -o public/shared.min.js -c -m && npx terser public/analytics.js -o public/analytics.min.js -c -m && npx terser public/script.js -o public/script.min.js -c -m && npx terser public/dictionary.js -o public/dictionary.min.js -c -m && npx terser public/passphrase-sim.js -o public/passphrase-sim.min.js -c -m && for f in public/js/*.js; do npx terser "$f" -o "${f%.js}.min.js" -c -m; done
scripts.build:css: npx lightningcss --minify public/style.css -o public/style.min.css && npx lightningcss --minify public/landing.css -o public/landing.min.css && npx lightningcss --minify public/about-us.css -o public/about-us.min.css && npx lightningcss --minify public/contacts.css -o public/contacts.min.css
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
